title: Resolve Tenant Identity at the Routing Boundary
prompt: Use $nextjs-production-platform to improve this code according to arch-multi-tenant.
notes: Resolve tenants from trusted host/path mappings and propagate a canonical tenant id into authorization, data access, and cache keys. Do not let users choose tenant context with query params.

title: Isolate Static Assets and Routing in Multi-Zones
prompt: Use $nextjs-production-platform to improve this code according to arch-multi-zones.
notes: Multi-Zones need explicit path ownership and static asset isolation. Configure `assetPrefix` and rewrites so zones do not collide on `_next` assets.

title: Coordinate Cache Tags Across Instances
prompt: Use $nextjs-production-platform to improve this code according to deploy-cache-coordination.
notes: For multi-instance self-hosting, coordinate cache storage and tag invalidation. Isolated local memory or filesystem cache can leave instances serving stale content.

title: Pin Server Actions Encryption Key Across Instances
prompt: Use $nextjs-production-platform to improve this code according to deploy-server-actions-key.
incorrect:
// INCORRECT: Multi-instance deployment leaves Server Action keys implicit.
export const requiredRuntimeEnv = ["DATABASE_URL", "NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL"];
notes: Self-hosted multi-instance deployments should provide a shared `NEXT_SERVER_ACTIONS_ENCRYPTION_KEY`; otherwise Server Action closures can fail across instances or builds.

title: Align Docker Runtime with Next.js Output Mode
prompt: Use $nextjs-production-platform to improve this code according to deploy-standalone-docker.
incorrect:
// INCORRECT: Runtime image assumes source install and package-manager start.
export const dockerfile = `
FROM oven/bun:1
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN bun install
RUN bun run build
CMD ["bun", "run", "start"]
`;
correct:
// CORRECT: Runtime image runs the traced standalone server with Node.
export const dockerfile = `
FROM node:24-alpine AS runner
WORKDIR /app
ENV NODE_ENV=production
COPY --from=builder /app/.next/standalone ./
COPY --from=builder /app/.next/static ./.next/static
COPY --from=builder /app/public ./public
CMD ["node", "server.js"]
`;
notes: Next.js standalone output traces the files needed to run the app. The production image should copy the standalone output and run `server.js` with Node unless the project has a deliberate custom server.

title: Put Production Instrumentation in Next.js Instrumentation Files
prompt: Use $nextjs-production-platform to improve this code according to ops-instrumentation.
notes: Use `instrumentation.ts` for runtime startup hooks. Avoid initializing telemetry inside layouts, components, handlers, or actions where it can run repeatedly.
